updated_at.description: When the domain was last updated

account_id.description: Account ID this domain belongs to

dns_records.description: DNS records required for domain verification

last_dns_check_at.description: When DNS records were last checked

dns_valid.description: Whether all required DNS records are properly configured

tracking_subdomain.description: Custom tracking subdomain. Null means the account or product default is used.

return_path_subdomain.description: Custom return-path subdomain. Null means the account or product default is used.

subscription_subdomain.description: Custom subscription management subdomain. Null means the account or product default is used.

media_subdomain.description: Custom media subdomain. Null means the account or product default is used.

dkim_rotation_interval_days.description: Custom DKIM rotation interval in days. Null means the account default is used.

rotation_ready.description: Whether the standby DKIM slot is ready for rotation.
